name: Sweet Potato Patch
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Pineapple, crushed, canned (unsweetened in its own juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Pierce sweet potato with a fork and place it in the oven for 45 minutes.
3. When the potato cools, cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
4. Steam carrots for 8 minutes.
5. Combine potato and carrots.
6. Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
7. Serve cool or at room temperature.
